# SNC Advertising

> Performance marketing agency specialising in Meta (Facebook & Instagram) ads for ecommerce and lead-generation brands. Senior execution, written reporting, async by default — no agency overhead. Based in Riga, serving the EU. Bilingual site: Russian at / and English at /en/.

## What SNC does
- Meta Ads for ecommerce: campaign launch, creative testing, daily optimisation, Pixel/CAPI, product catalogs, Advantage+ Shopping, retargeting.
- Meta Ads for lead generation: lead campaigns for service businesses, optimised for cost per lead and lead quality (not clicks).
- Optional creative briefs and freelance coordination (production billed separately, never inside the retainer).
- One channel — Meta — run deeply. No Google Ads, TikTok, SEO, Amazon, or influencer work.

## How they work
- Written-first: reports and briefs in writing; one optional monthly strategy call. No status calls.
- Live performance dashboard and full ad-account access from day one.
- Written update every Friday; monthly P&L-style report.
- 30-day cancellation, no penalty.
- Every engagement starts with a written audit (teardown) of the prospect's Meta ad account, after a short written qualifying step. The audit is not an instant or ungated freebie — it follows a brief fit conversation.

## Who it's for
- Ecommerce brands doing roughly €300k+/year, ad budget from €1k/month (€3–10k/month is the sweet spot).
- Founders who want transparent, numbers-first reporting rather than slide decks, and who are comfortable working in writing.

## Who it's not for
- Brands wanting guaranteed ROAS or a guaranteed lead count.
- Budgets under €1k/month, or buyers needing daily calls / 24-7 chat access.

## Pricing
- Not published. Quoted after a short conversation; depends on scope (ecommerce typically more involved than lead-gen). Ecommerce and lead-gen are priced differently.

## Proof
- The site carries an anonymised teardown of a real Meta account (EU premium cosmetics, ~€8k spend, 4.5 months): true ROAS 0.33x vs the 1.09x the dashboard reported, 43% of selling budget wasted, 6 dead regions, 50% of creative impressions defective — with a Phase-1 fix plan inside the same budget. It is the agency's main proof in lieu of named client case studies (clients are under NDA; SNC launched in 2026).

## Founders
- Nikita — Meta / delivery: 4 years running Meta Ads for EU ecommerce brands.
- Dmitrijs — commercial / finance: fractional-CFO background; runs pricing, unit economics, client relationships.
